Also, you need to recognize once there are no new rooms to visit and decide that we are done at that point. Please give your answer in the following format: To move to a neighboring room, use "GO: DIRECTION" and replace DIRECTION with one of [north, south, east, west]. To stop the exploration, answer with "DONE" instead. Omit any other text.
Here is an example:
You are in the Kitchen. Currently available directions: south, west. What is your next instruction?
GO: west
You have made a step and entered a Lobby. Currently available directions: east, north. What is your next instruction?
GO: north
...
You have made a step and entered a Bedroom. Currently available directions: south. What is your next instruction?
DONE
Let us start. You are in the Sauna. Currently available directions: east. What is your next instruction?
GO: east
You have made a step and entered Gallery. Currently available directions: south, west, east. What is your next instruction?
GO: south
You have made a step and entered Exercise room. Currently available directions: north. What is your next instruction?
GO: north
You have made a step and entered Gallery. Currently available directions: south, west, east. What is your next instruction?
GO: west
You have made a step and entered Sauna. Currently available directions: east. What is your next instruction?
GO: east
You have made a step and entered Gallery. Currently available directions: south, west, east. What is your next instruction?
GO: south
You have made a step and entered Exercise room. Currently available directions: north. What is your next instruction?
GO: west
The move is not valid. You are still in the Exercise room. Currently available directions: north. What is your next instruction?
GO: north
You have made a step and entered Gallery. Currently available directions: south, west, east. What is your next instruction?
GO: west
You have made a step and entered Sauna. Currently available directions: east. What is your next instruction?
GO: east
You have made a step and entered Gallery. Currently available directions: south, west, east. What is your next instruction?
GO: south
You have made a step and entered Exercise room. Currently available directions: north. What is your next instruction?
GO: east
The move is not valid. You are still in the Exercise room. Currently available directions: north. What is your next instruction?
GO: north
You have made a step and entered Gallery. Currently available directions: south, west, east. What is your next instruction?
GO: east
You have made a step and entered Media room. Currently available directions: south, west. What is your next instruction?
GO: south
You have made a step and entered Attic. Currently available directions: north, south. What is your next instruction?
GO: south
You have made a step and entered Game room. Currently available directions: north. What is your next instruction?
GO: north
You have made a step and entered Attic. Currently available directions: north, south. What is your next instruction?
GO: north
You have made a step and entered Media room. Currently available directions: south, west. What is your next instruction?

message.reasoning: We need to explore all rooms with minimal moves. We have visited: Sauna, Gallery, Exercise room, Media room, Attic, Game room. Unknown rooms maybe others. From Media room (south, west). We came from Attic via north, so can go south back to Attic or west to some other room. Need to explore new. Likely west leads to a new room. Let's go west.

message.reasoning:
We need to explore all rooms with fewest moves, but we don't know full map. We have visited: Sauna, Gallery, Exercise room, Media room, Attic, Game room. There may be other rooms accessible from Gallery: directions south, west, east. We've been going south to Exercise room, east to Media room, west back to Sauna. We have also visited north from Exercise (back to Gallery). From Media room, we went south to Attic then north back. Also west from Media back to Gallery. Gallery still has possible directions: we have taken south, west, east? We have taken east to Media, west to Sauna, south to Exercise. All three have been explored. But maybe there are other rooms beyond those that we haven't visited beyond those paths? Need to check if any new rooms accessible from those other rooms besides those we have seen.

We have not explored north from Gallery (not listed). Gallery's available directions: south, west, east. No north.

From Sauna we only have east (to Gallery). So no new.

From Exercise room only north (to Gallery). So no new.

From Media room we have south and west. West leads to Gallery, south leads to Attic (we visited). So no new.

From Attic we have north and south. North goes to Media room (we know), south goes to Game room (we visited). So no new.

From Game room only north back to Attic.

Thus all rooms visited: Sauna, Gallery, Exercise room, Media room, Attic, Game room. Are there any other rooms not yet visited? Possibly there is a room reachable from somewhere else we haven't seen because we haven't taken some direction from a room. But all directions from each visited room have been taken at least once: Gallery's three, Sauna's only east, Exercise only north, Media both south and west, Attic both north and south (north back to Media, south to Game), Game only north. So map fully explored.

Thus we can stop. Answer DONE.
